description: Self-IP Agency cron configuration template. Fill WORKSPACE_PATH after install.

jobs.name: main-heartbeat
jobs.description: Main orchestrator heartbeat — checks TAS, dispatches sub-agents. Entrypoint: scripts/main-heartbeat.sh

jobs.name: bookmarker-cycle
jobs.description: Bookmarker social curation cycle. Entrypoint: scripts/bookmarker-cycle.sh

jobs.name: trader-cycle
jobs.description: Trader on-chain operations cycle (runs hourly). Entrypoint: scripts/trader-cycle.sh

_notes.channel_config: No announce channel is required for local/distributable deployments. All cycle scripts run locally and write results to runtime/*/. To enable optional announcements, configure announce_channel in config/agency.config.yaml.
_notes.entrypoint_model: All three cycles use dedicated shell entrypoints (scripts/*-heartbeat.sh, scripts/*-cycle.sh). The legacy pattern of 'Read runtime/*/task.json' is NOT used — task.json files in runtime-template are compatibility placeholders only.
